title: 60fy Viewmodel Customizer
description: A simple client-side mod allowing customization of players viewmodel with ModMenu.
body:
Minecraft's viewmodels cover a significant portion of the player's screen. This mod was created to **allow full customization** of the **position**, **rotation**, and **scale** of your held item and arm viewmodel.

Currently, it **only works with the Fabric** mod loader and is **configurable only through ModMenu**. However, I plan to add support for other mod loaders.

Requires **FabricAPI**, **ModMenu** and **Yet Another Config Library (YACL)**.
